answer: Yes, Linear provides developer API and webhook access on its Free plan [1][2]. You can use the GraphQL API to query and mutate workspace data, including issues, projects, and teams [2][3]. The Free plan supports both personal API keys for internal automation and OAuth for user-authorized applications [2]. While the API is available, keep in mind the Free plan is limited to 2 teams and 250 issues [1][2]. You can access documentation and start using the API at developers.linear.app [2].
